productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys White T-shirt
description: Composition White polo neck T-shirt, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, half buttoned placket, brand name embroidered on the left chest and brand tag on the hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery boys will love this T-shirt from gini and jony.
